project1_desc: Solves the problem of overly long AI follow-up questions that degrade respondent experience. Dynamically controls question length based on answer length, device type, and interview mode.
project3_desc: Automatically translates vague client requirements into executable technical solutions. Supports conflict detection, fuzzy marking, and one-click TRD generation.
home_subtitle: Two core optimization projects for the Quria AI Interview System
answer_placeholder: Enter a simulated respondent answer (e.g., I think the product is okay, but the price is a bit high)
requirement_placeholder: Enter client requirement (e.g., We want to deeply understand young mothers' purchase decisions, the more samples the better, deliver ASAP)
